TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Ratuc, title = Ratuc, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ratuc} }

S.FORM: ratuc еӨ§иӢ§йә»ең’ Ex: niqan duma kingal ratuc, niqan duma kingal rituk. иЈңе……: rituk е°ҸиӢ§йә»ең’
S.PHON: ЙҫatuКҰ **** Йҷx: niqan duma kiЕӢal ЙҫatuКҰ, niqan duma kiЕӢal Йҫituk. **: Йҫituk ****
S.FORM: ratuc еӨ§иӢ§йә»ең’ Ex: niqan duma kingal ratuc, niqan duma kingal rituk. иЈңе……: rituk е°ҸиӢ§йә»ең’
S.PHON: ЙҫatuКҰ **** Йҷx: niqan duma kiЕӢal ЙҫatuКҰ, niqan duma kiЕӢal Йҫituk. **: Йҫituk ****
